# SalesQL — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | ✓ | Core: Chrome extension extracts email + mobile from LinkedIn and Sales Navigator; reverse email lookup returns name, title, company, LinkedIn; 200M+ contacts; AI-powered search (describe profile → AI finds leads) |
| [[email-verification]] | ✓ | Format / Type / Server / Status checks; 100 free credits/month; paid plans higher limits |
| [[email-warmup]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[personalisation]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | — | Not applicable |

## Vendor Type
Point solution: LinkedIn-focused email extraction. Strong for Sales Navigator users who want 1-click prospect capture.

## Best For
SDRs working directly in LinkedIn or Sales Navigator who need to quickly extract emails and build lists without leaving the browser.

## Limitations
- Email and profile extraction only — no sending, warm-up, or inbox
- Accuracy estimated ~90% vs. Prospeo's 98%
- Must pair with a sequencer for outreach
- API enrichment available but less feature-rich than dedicated enrichment tools
